subject: 🏃 Monday — Hip & Core A (Week 2, isometrics progress)
html:
Today: Hip & Core A — Week 2 of Chassis Build. Same session as last Monday, but this week you're bumping all isometric holds by 5 seconds: Copenhagen plank to 25 sec, Pallof press holds to 20 sec, wall sits to 50 sec. Everything else stays at the same load. Your knee has been Green across four straight sessions — the cleanest streak since we started — so the chassis work is doing its job. Don't rush the holds; breathe through them and own the full duration.

Focus cue: On the single-leg glute bridge, drive through the heel and squeeze the glute for a full 2 seconds at top. If you catch yourself lifting with your lower back instead of your glute, reset. That hip extension pattern is what keeps load out of your knee.

Context: Week 2 of 4 in Chassis Build — 2.5 weeks to your May 15 PT follow-up, 90 days to race day. Thursday you'll run 4 miles (up from last week's 3). Next gym session is Upper Push tomorrow.

Session order:

Daily Mobility Flush (~12 min) — do this first:
Foam roller T-spine extensions (PT): 8–10 reps | Standing lunges w/ hip IR + extension (PT): 8–10 reps each side | World's greatest stretch: 5 each side | 90/90 hip stretch (IR emphasis): 60 sec each side | Half-kneeling couch stretch: 60 sec each side | Hip CARs: 3 each direction, each leg | Cat-cow: 10 reps

Warm-up (10 min):
Foam roll: IT band, TFL, glutes, quads, adductors — 30 sec each, both sides (5 min)
Quadruped banded hip IR / lateral band pull (PT): 8 reps each side
Banded hip distraction with IR emphasis: 90 sec each side
90/90 transitions: 10 reps
Glute bridges (banded above knees): 15 reps, 2-sec squeeze at top

Main circuit — 3 rounds:

ExerciseRxSets × Reps
90/90 PAILs/RAILs (hip IR isometric)Bodyweight3 × 10 sec each direction, each side
Side-lying clamshell (banded)Light band3 × 15 each side, 2-sec hold at top
Single-leg glute bridgeBodyweight3 × 12 each side, 2-sec hold
Hip airplaneBodyweight3 × 8 each side
Copenhagen plankBodyweight3 × 25 sec each side (+5 sec)
Dead bug — slow march w/ banded pulldown (PT)Light band overhead2–3 × 10 marches
Chin tuck + lifts, front & diagonal (PT)Bodyweight2 reps each direction, 3-sec hold
Pallof press (isometric hold)Light band3 × 20 sec each side (+5 sec)

Finisher:
Wall sit: 50 sec × 3 (+5 sec)
Terminal knee extension (TKE), right leg only: 3 × 15 with light band

Cool-down:
Pigeon pose: 60 sec each side | Couch stretch: 60 sec each side
